title: ipomoea minuta f. adiantifolia
intro: Ipomoea minuta f. adiantifolia, commonly known as the small morning glory or dwarf morning glory, is a plant species native to tropical Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Traditionally, Ipomoea minuta f. adiantifolia has been used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
